basic_details.job_title: SSA Quality Expert Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Quality Expert (Quality and Pedagogy, Teacher Training)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age as on 01-01-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Arts/Science, B.Ed., 5 years experience, MS Office expertise
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Arts/Science from any recognized university. B.Ed. from any recognized university. At least 5 years of working experience at the State or District level in a Government Institution/Government Recognized Society/Government Recognized Higher Education Institution/University/Colleges/Reputed Research Organization. Proven expertise in MS Office.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Quality Expert (Quality and Pedagogy, Teacher Training)

salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- Per Month + Grade Pay Rs. 13,300/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SSA Quality Expert (Quality and Pedagogy, Teacher Training) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SSA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download SSA Quality Expert Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SSA Quality Expert recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the SSA Quality Expert (Quality and Pedagogy, Teacher Training) position is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Arts/Science, a B.Ed. degree, and have at least 5 years of relevant working experience, along with MS Office proficiency.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Quality Expert position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 62 years, as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Quality Expert role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- per month, plus a Grade Pay of Rs. 13,300/-.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Quality Expert post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Quality Expert (Quality and Pedagogy, Teacher Training) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official Samagra Shiksha Axom website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Quality Expert role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The direct links for the official notification PDF and the online application form are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
